title: Battery Electrode Electrochemistry (Newman-Doyle-Fuller) Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: eps*dc/dt + div(N_i) = R_intercalation; N_i = -D_eff*grad(c) + t_plus*I/F; particle: dc_s/dt = (1/r^2)*d/dr(r^2*D_s*dc_s/dr)
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for Battery Electrode Electrochemistry (Newman-Doyle-Fuller)

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=70) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class PyBaMM or LIONSIMBA; adjoint-parameter fit; Bayesian inference provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
